Affects: It affects the UK music history.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Second British Invasion.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the synth-pop genre.
ComposedBy: It was composed by Chris Lowe and Neil Tennant.

DirectedBy: It was directed by Derek Jarman.
It was directed by Jack Bond.
HasA: It has 22 top-10 hits on the UK singles chart.
It has five US top 10 singles in the 1980s.
It has 11 number-one hits on the Hot Dance Club Play chart.
It has 31 top-10 entries on the Hot Dance Club Play chart.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by one-word album titles.
HeldIn: It was held in Los Angeles.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by disco and electronic music.
It was influenced by "Souvenir" by Orchestral Manoeuvres in the Dark.
It was influenced by "Bedsitter" by Soft Cell.
It was influenced by pioneers of electronic music including OMD, Soft Cell, Kraftwerk, the Human League, and Depeche Mode.

It is a dance duo or group.

It is known for its tradition of choosing one-word album titles.
